text:
There once was a little girl named Ellie. Every morning she would wake up with a giggle. She loved to eat breakfast. Her favorite thing to eat was pancakes. One day she poured maple syrup on an pancakes too much.

She screamed. Her eyes darted everywhere. Nobody was nearby. Too scared!

Determined she walked over to the fridge. Inside she found milk. Nothing else though.

She drank that.

It quelled her screaming. She smiled. She knew pancakes were perfect.

Next morning she cooked them. Much safer. She had always been silly.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
